name: South Tour with La Rhumerie
desc: Discover the highlights of southern Mauritius on this iconic full day tour. Visit the volcanic crater lake of Trou aux Cerfs, the sacred Hindu lake of Grand Bassin, and the world-famous seven-coloured earth at Chamarel. End with a rum tasting and gourmet lunch at La Rhumerie de Chamarel.
itin: Pride of the Islands — miniature ship models
Lunch at La Rhumerie de Chamarel
notes: Seat in air-conditioned coach. Entrance to Chamarel Coloured Earth included. Lunch at La Rhumerie de Chamarel included. Minimum 6 pax.
